questions.text: Decision Table is essential for the Program MM/SD works
Plant / Sales Org and Distribution Channel are optional fields
The Decision Table rules can be set up for all types of products, even if no filters are used
Identify two specific "Criteria" for the “Decision Table" that can be used to control the evolution of Material Master (MM) and Sales Distribution (SD) Status
options: Any from this list: Units of measure, Forecast, Forecast Months, Unrestricted Stocks, Stock (Batch Rest), Blocked Stocks, Stock In-Transit, Stock Consignment, Goods Receipt, GR_Range (Past), Goods Issue, GI_Range (Past). Sales Master Data

questions.text: In the context of the "Copy Master Data GLOBAL", what is the consequence if there is an ASN or GR of Code In?
options: The Master Data will then be copied from Code Out to Code In, whatever the Code Out MM status

questions.text: What's the main objective of BRF+ Decision Table?
options: To set up rules for changing MM/SD status

questions.text: What are the mandatory fields on the BRF+ Decision Table?
The "Copy Master Data GLOBAL" can be triggered by which fields?
options: GR (Goods Reception) or GI (Goods Issue) or MSL status

questions.text: If I choose Autoupdate "No", how does the MM/SD change?
options: With Autoupdate "No", MM/SD changes only if the user validates on the Fiori App

questions.text: How many Fiori Apps do we have to validate changes on MM/SD status?
